textPlain: This is about 5 specific individuals, not all of Europe. It's funny how quick they are to make a statement about this, when it's one of their guys (Breton), but the many employees at the ICC, they have to complain in the media about being effectively barred from using financial services and despite that, for them they haven't put out a press release even now.

>If needed, we will respond swiftly and decisively to defend our regulatory autonomy against unjustified measures.We know what this really means, the EU will really do nothing but maybe talk to the US ambassador in a stern tone.  I wish here in the US and elsewhere people would stand up to the current US regime.
